Title: Jungle Bunch: Operation Meltdown
Director: Laurent Bru, Yannick Moulin, Benoît Somville
Writer: David Alaux, Eric Tosti, Jean-François Tosti
Actors: Philippe Bozo, Laurent Morteau, Pascal Casanova
Plot: When a mysterious Super-Villain covers the jungle with a toxic pink foam that explodes on contact with water, the Jungle Bunch is called to the rescue. With less than a month before the rainy season, the race is on.
